notification.messageText:
🚨 Job Search Update

Type: linkedin_job_post
Company: Unknown
Role: Backend Engineer
Score: 95/100
Action: Open the source and contact the author or recruiter.

Summary:
Linkedin Job Post: We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer at Acme (95/100).

Why it matters:
target role; matching stack: node.js, typescript, nestjs, postgresql, redis, ai agents, rag; remote/B2B fit; seniority fit; product ownership; AI/RAG relevance

Suggested reply:
Hi [Name], I saw your post about Backend Engineer. My background is mainly Node.js, TypeScript, NestJS, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and cloud-based product engineering for remote teams. I’d be happy to share my CV and discuss whether my profile fits.

Open:
https://www.linkedin.com/posts/acme-smoke
